titleStmt.title: SII 16.252: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 252. (A.R. No. 413 of 1926.) MIḌUTŪRU, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the front wall of the prākāra of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1483, Durmati, Jyēsṭha ba. 10, corresponding to 1561 A.D., June 7 (Saturday).

It registers the grant of some land in the village Mirutūru to god Chennakēśvara of the place for the day-offerings on the occasion of Utthāna-dvādaśi, by Daḷavāyi Bhadri-nāyaka for the merit of his father Chiṭṭela Bommi-nāyaka, from out of the sarvamānya land obtained by him from Anantarāju-Narasarāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1483 Agunēṭi du¨rmati saṁvatsara jyēṣṭa ba 10 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśiva dēvamahārā
yalu vijayanagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛdhivisāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmadakhilāṁḍakōṭibrahmāṁḍanāyaka vēdavēdāṁttavēdya purāṇapuruṣōttamuṁḍaina śrī mirutū
ri caṁnnakēśvaradēvara divyaśrīpādapadmaṁbulaku ciṭṭela boṁminēni komāruṁḍu daḷavāyi bhadrināyanigāru Anaṁttamulayina daṁḍḍamulu sama¨rpiṁcci yiccina būdhānadharma śāsanakramame
ṭlaṁnannu māku Anaṁttarāju narasarājugāru māku mirutūrigrāmāna sarvamānyaṁgānu yiccina polaṁ grāmānaku paḍamara yarabomuyēlreḍḍi yīḍuva polaṁlō staḷālu 2
lōpalānu naḍimi rēgeḍu staḷaṁ cēnu kha 1 1 Akṣarālānu puṭeṁḍu tūmeṁḍu cēnunnu svāmi pagaṭi Āragiṁppuku Aṁdula palaṁ dhāravōśi yistimi . tama taṁḍri boṁminēnigāThe word svāmi is engraved above the line.
riki puṇyaṁgānu I vuttānadvādaśipuṇyakālamaṁdu dhāravōśi yistimi . Aṁdula kānika kaṭnālu paṁrokhaṁ saḥgā trivācikaṁgānu trikaraṇaśudhigānu dhāravōśi yistimi yī dharmānaku
yavaru tappinaḍacinānu vāraṇāśilō gōvubrāṁhmani vadhiṁccina papāna bōvuvāru . sva dattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt .
maṁgaḷa mahāśrīśrī jēyunū .
Digital edition of SII 16.252 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
